series_metadata.series_description: Documentation to determine tax credit eligibility under the Work Opportunity Tax Credit (WOTC) program for certified applications.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 1 year and in records center 4 years, then destroy provided audits are complete, reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
